name: Barbecue Style Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange medium hot coals in a covered grill around a drip pan. Test the heat above the pan to ensure it is medium.
2. Place ribs on the grill rack over the drip pan, but not directly over the coals.
3. Lower the grill hood and grill for 1 hour.
4. To prepare the sauce:
a. In a medium saucepan, cook onion and garlic in hot oil until tender.
b. Stir in tomato sauce, brown sugar, lemon juice, worcestershire sauce, mustard, celery seed, 1/2 cup water, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper.
c. Simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Brush ribs with the prepared sauce.
6. Grill ribs for an additional 30 minutes or until well done, brushing occasionally with sauce.
7. Serve the remaining sauce alongside the ribs.
